name: Spicy Chili with Sour Cream Dumplings
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook and stir ground beef, onion, and garlic in a 4-quart Dutch oven until the beef is brown; drain.
2. Stir in chili powder, sugar, salt, pepper, stewed tomatoes, kidney beans, tomato sauce, and green chilies.
3. Heat to boiling, stirring frequently; reduce heat. Cover and simmer, stirring occasionally for 1 hour.
4. Mix sour cream and milk in a medium bowl until smooth. Mix in baking mix until a soft dough forms.
5. Drop dough by 6 spoonfuls onto hot chili. Cook uncovered over low heat for 10 minutes. Cover and cook an additional 10 minutes longer.
6. Sprinkle with snipped parsley if desired.
